title: Twitter/X Profile Scraper - Extract Tweets & Analytics
description: Scrape Twitter/X profiles and recent tweets. Use an official X API bearer token for reliable runs; no-login syndication mode remains available as a guarded fallback.

usernames.title: Twitter/X Usernames or Profile URLs
usernames.description: List of Twitter/X usernames (e.g. 'elonmusk') or full profile URLs (e.g. 'https://x.com/elonmusk'). One per line.

dataSource.title: Data Source
dataSource.description: Auto uses X API mode when a bearer token is supplied, otherwise no-login syndication mode.

xApiBearerToken.title: X API Bearer Token
xApiBearerToken.description: Optional official X API v2 bearer token. Recommended because no-login syndication is heavily rate-limited.

maxTweetsPerProfile.title: Max Tweets Per Profile
maxTweetsPerProfile.description: Maximum number of tweets to scrape per profile. X API mode fetches up to 100 per API page.

includeReplies.title: Include Replies
includeReplies.description: Include reply tweets in the results.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings for no-login syndication mode. X API mode does not need a proxy.
